summary: Comprehensive testing completed for EXE-Tradebot2 application - all core functionality verified as working
passed_tests: Backend API /api/health returns valid status with degraded state (Discord/Broker disconnected as expected)
Backend API /api/status returns complete bot status information
Backend API /api/portfolio returns all required fields (open_positions, closed_positions, losing_trades, best_trade, worst_trade, average_pnl)
Backend API /api/brokers returns 9 brokers (Interactive Brokers, Alpaca, TD Ameritrade, etc.)
Backend API /api/reset-loss-counters works without admin key when ADMIN_API_KEY not set
Backend API /api/toggle-trading successfully toggles auto trading state
Backend API /api/auto-shutdown-settings returns complete settings structure
Frontend Dashboard loads completely with all sections visible
Frontend navigation tabs work (Positions, Trades, Alerts, Settings)
Frontend Settings page loads with comprehensive configuration options
Frontend shows proper connection status (Discord OFF, IBKR Broker OFF)
Frontend displays P&L section, Auto Trading controls, Risk Controls, and Recent data sections
Frontend integration with backend APIs working (live data display)
